verbatim_quote: If you don't know how to think about high dimensions, if you wanna think about like a hundred-dimensional space, the way you do it is you think about a three dimensional space, and you say, "Hundred," to yourself very loudly. So it's gotta shape, this word.
gloss: [ANALOGY] If you don't know how to think about high dimensions, if you wanna think about like a hundred-dimensional space, the way you do it is you think about a three dimensional space, ...
